You are a programming expert. 
You will be provided with a patch used to fix a bug. 

Your task is summarize the modifications made in the patch.
Your summary should consist of two parts, modifications in each file and their relationships.

From 1f464b9412e1b1c08d40c8ffac40edd52731da48 Mon Sep 17 00:00:00 2001 From: Bosanac Dejan Date: Tue, 23 Feb 2010 15:38:26 +0000 Subject: [PATCH] merging 915269,915384 - https://issues.apache.org/activemq/browse/AMQ-2613 - XSS and CSRF vunerabilities git-svn-id: https://svn.apache.org/repos/asf/activemq/branches/activemq-5.3@915387 13f79535-47bb-0310-9956-ffa450edef68 diff --git a/activemq-web-console/src/main/webapp/queues.jsp b/activemq-web-console/src/main/webapp/queues.jsp index bb68e0ac0..ab535e471 100644 --- a/activemq-web-console/src/main/webapp/queues.jsp +++ b/activemq-web-console/src/main/webapp/queues.jsp @@ -21,8 +21,9 @@
-
+ + "/> @@ -48,22 +49,23 @@ + - +"> ${row.queueSize} ${row.consumerCount} ${row.enqueueCount} ${row.dequeueCount} - Browse - Active Consumers
- - + ">Browse + ">Active Consumers
+ ?view=rss&feedType=atom_1.0" title="Atom 1.0"> + ?view=rss&feedType=rss_2.0" title="RSS 2.0"> - Send To - Purge - Delete + &JMSDestinationType=queue">Send To + &JMSDestinationType=queue&secret=">Purge + &JMSDestinationType=queue&secret=">Delete diff --git a/activemq-web-console/src/main/webapp/queueConsumers.jsp b/activemq-web-console/src/main/webapp/queueConsumers.jsp index d38fbfd5f..862c6075b 100644 --- a/activemq-web-console/src/main/webapp/queueConsumers.jsp +++ b/activemq-web-console/src/main/webapp/queueConsumers.jsp @@ -16,11 +16,11 @@ --%> -Consumers for ${requestContext.queueConsumerQuery.JMSDestination} +Consumers for <c:out value="${requestContext.queueConsumerQuery.JMSDestination}" /> -

Active Consumers for ${requestContext.queueConsumerQuery.JMSDestination}

+

Active Consumers for

diff --git a/activemq-web-console/src/main/webapp/topics.jsp b/activemq-web-console/src/main/webapp/topics.jsp index 40f6a8514..310333dd8 100644 --- a/activemq-web-console/src/main/webapp/topics.jsp +++ b/activemq-web-console/src/main/webapp/topics.jsp @@ -23,6 +23,7 @@
+ "/> @@ -46,13 +47,13 @@
- + diff --git a/activemq-web-console/src/main/webapp/message.jsp b/activemq-web-console/src/main/webapp/message.jsp index 75d18cef3..b5db6aec1 100644 --- a/activemq-web-console/src/main/webapp/message.jsp +++ b/activemq-web-console/src/main/webapp/message.jsp @@ -130,16 +130,16 @@ No message could be found for ID ${requestContext.messageQuery.id} - + - + - +
&JMSDestinationType=topic"> ${row.consumerCount} ${row.enqueueCount} ${row.dequeueCount} - Send To - Delete + &JMSDestinationType=topic">Send To + &JMSDestinationType=topic&secret=">Delete
Delete&messageId=${row.JMSMessageID}&secret=">Delete
Copy&messageId=${row.JMSMessageID}&JMSDestinationType=queue&secret=')">Copy @@ -147,7 +147,7 @@ No message could be found for ID ${requestContext.messageQuery.id}
Move&messageId=${row.JMSMessageID}&JMSDestinationType=queue&secret=')">Move
diff --git a/activemq-web-console/src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/tags/form/short.tag b/activemq-web-console/src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/tags/form/short.tag index 3302e4429..ed82a97e1 100644 --- a/activemq-web-console/src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/tags/form/short.tag +++ b/activemq-web-console/src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/tags/form/short.tag @@ -17,6 +17,8 @@ <%@ attribute name="text" type="java.lang.String" required="true" %> <%@ attribute name="length" type="java.lang.Integer" required="false" %> <% + text = org.apache.commons.lang.StringEscapeUtils.escapeHtml(text); + text = org.apache.commons.lang.StringEscapeUtils.escapeJavaScript(text); if (length == null) length = 20; if (text.length() <= 20) { diff --git a/activemq-web/src/main/java/org/apache/activemq/web/DestinationFacade.java b/activemq-web/src/main/java/org/apache/activemq/web/DestinationFacade.java index 8cfb0ee39..b7dfbf594 100644 --- a/activemq-web/src/main/java/org/apache/activemq/web/DestinationFacade.java +++ b/activemq-web/src/main/java/org/apache/activemq/web/DestinationFacade.java @@ -128,4 +128,8 @@ public class DestinationFacade { protected String getPhysicalDestinationName() { return createDestination().getPhysicalName(); } + + public String[] getSupportedHttpMethods() { + return new String[]{"GET", "POST"}; + } } diff --git a/activemq-web-console/src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/tags/form/text.tag b/activemq-web-console/src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/tags/form/text.tag index a557a42bb..521bc6da9 100644 --- a/activemq-web-console/src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/tags/form/text.tag +++ b/activemq-web-console/src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/tags/form/text.tag @@ -19,10 +19,12 @@ <% String value = request.getParameter(name); if (value == null || value.trim().length() == 0) { - value = defaultValue; - } - if (value == null) { - value = ""; - } + value = defaultValue; + } + if (value == null) { + value = ""; + } + value = org.apache.commons.lang.StringEscapeUtils.escapeHtml(value); + %> diff --git a/activemq-web-console/src/main/java/org/apache/activemq/web/controller/CreateSubscriber.java b/activemq-web-console/src/main/java/org/apache/activemq/web/controller/CreateSubscriber.java index b9055e118..fb87ae359 100644 --- a/activemq-web-console/src/main/java/org/apache/activemq/web/controller/CreateSubscriber.java +++ b/activemq-web-console/src/main/java/org/apache/activemq/web/controller/CreateSubscriber.java @@ -50,5 +50,9 @@ public class CreateSubscriber extends DurableSubscriberFacade implements Control getBrokerAdmin().createDurableSubscriber(getClientId(), getSubscriberName(), getValidDestination(), selector); return new ModelAndView("redirect:subscribers.jsp"); } + + public String[] getSupportedHttpMethods() { + return new String[]{"POST"}; + } } diff --git a/activemq-web-console/src/main/java/org/apache/activemq/web/handler/BindingBeanNameUrlHandlerMapping.java b/activemq-web-console/src/main/java/org/apache/activemq/web/handler/BindingBeanNameUrlHandlerMapping.java index 399ca509b..6f899286a 100644 --- a/activemq-web-console/src/main/java/org/apache/activemq/web/handler/BindingBeanNameUrlHandlerMapping.java +++ b/activemq-web-console/src/main/java/org/apache/activemq/web/handler/BindingBeanNameUrlHandlerMapping.java @@ -16,8 +16,12 @@ */ package org.apache.activemq.web.handler; +import java.util.Arrays; +import java.util.UUID; + import javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest; +import org.apache.activemq.web.DestinationFacade; import org.apache.commons.logging.Log; import org.apache.commons.logging.LogFactory; import org.springframework.web.bind.ServletRequestDataBinder; @@ -41,8 +45,21 @@ public class BindingBeanNameUrlHandlerMapping extends BeanNameUrlHandlerMapping HandlerExecutionChain handlerExecutionChain = (HandlerExecutionChain) object; object = handlerExecutionChain.getHandler(); } - + if (object != null) { + // prevent CSRF attacks + if (object instanceof DestinationFacade) { + // check supported methods + if (!Arrays.asList(((DestinationFacade)object).getSupportedHttpMethods()).contains(request.getMethod())) { + throw new UnsupportedOperationException("Unsupported method " + request.getMethod() + " for path " + request.getRequestURI()); + } + // check the 'secret' + if (!request.getSession().getAttribute("secret").equals(request.getParameter("secret"))) { + throw new UnsupportedOperationException("Possible CSRF attack"); + } + } + + ServletRequestDataBinder binder = new ServletRequestDataBinder(object, "request"); try { binder.bind(request); @@ -56,6 +73,7 @@ public class BindingBeanNameUrlHandlerMapping extends BeanNameUrlHandlerMapping throw e; } } + return object; } } diff --git a/activemq-web/src/main/java/org/apache/activemq/web/SessionFilter.java b/activemq-web/src/main/java/org/apache/activemq/web/SessionFilter.java index 120f43257..9a6988368 100644 --- a/activemq-web/src/main/java/org/apache/activemq/web/SessionFilter.java +++ b/activemq-web/src/main/java/org/apache/activemq/web/SessionFilter.java @@ -18,6 +18,7 @@ package org.apache.activemq.web; import java.io.IOException; +import java.util.UUID; import javax.servlet.Filter; import javax.servlet.FilterChain; @@ -39,7 +40,8 @@ public class SessionFilter implements Filter { } public void doFilter(ServletRequest request, ServletResponse response, FilterChain chain) throws IOException, ServletException { - ((HttpServletRequest)request).getSession(true); + // set secret to prevent CSRF attacks + ((HttpServletRequest)request).getSession(true).setAttribute("secret", UUID.randomUUID().toString());; chain.doFilter(request, response); } -- 2.34.1 diff --git a/activemq-web-console/src/main/webapp/browse.jsp b/activemq-web-console/src/main/webapp/browse.jsp index e2b76558a..6e7c4ec05 100644 --- a/activemq-web-console/src/main/webapp/browse.jsp +++ b/activemq-web-console/src/main/webapp/browse.jsp @@ -39,7 +39,7 @@ -

### Modifications Summary

#### Modifications in Each File

1. **queues.jsp**
   - Changed the form method from `get` to `post` for creating destinations.
   - Added a hidden input field for a `secret` value to prevent CSRF attacks.
   - Updated links to use `<c:out>` for escaping the `JMSDestination` parameter to prevent XSS vulnerabilities.

2. **queueConsumers.jsp**
   - Updated the title and header to use `<c:out>` for escaping the `JMSDestination` to prevent XSS vulnerabilities.

3. **topics.jsp**
   - Added a hidden input field for a `secret` value to prevent CSRF attacks.
   - Updated links to use `<c:out>` for escaping the `JMSDestination` parameter to prevent XSS vulnerabilities.

4. **message.jsp**
   - Updated delete and copy message links to include a `secret` parameter and use `<c:out>` for escaping `JMSDestination` to prevent XSS vulnerabilities.

5. **short.tag**
   - Escaped HTML and JavaScript in the `text` attribute to prevent XSS vulnerabilities.

6. **DestinationFacade.java**
   - Added a method to return supported HTTP methods (`GET`, `POST`).

7. **text.tag**
   - Escaped HTML for the input value to prevent XSS vulnerabilities.

8. **CreateSubscriber.java**
   - Added a method to return supported HTTP methods (`POST`).

9. **BindingBeanNameUrlHandlerMapping.java**
   - Implemented CSRF protection by checking the request method and validating the `secret` parameter against the session.

10. **SessionFilter.java**
    - Set a `secret` attribute in the session to prevent CSRF attacks.

11. **browse.jsp**
    - (No specific changes were detailed in the provided diff for this file.)

#### Relationships Between Modifications

- The modifications across the various JSP files (queues.jsp, queueConsumers.jsp, topics.jsp, message.jsp, and browse.jsp) are primarily focused on enhancing security against XSS and CSRF vulnerabilities. This is achieved by:
  - Changing form methods to `post` where necessary.
  - Adding a `secret` token to forms and links to validate requests.
  - Using `<c:out>` to escape user input and prevent XSS attacks.

- The backend changes in `DestinationFacade.java`, `CreateSubscriber.java`, and `BindingBeanNameUrlHandlerMapping.java` complement the frontend changes by ensuring that only allowed HTTP methods are processed and that CSRF protection is enforced through session management.

- The `SessionFilter.java` establishes a mechanism to generate and store a unique `secret` for each session, which is critical for the CSRF protection implemented in the handler mapping.

Overall, the patch collectively strengthens the security of the web console by addressing both XSS and CSRF vulnerabilities through a combination of frontend and backend changes.

Based on your summary and the commit message in the patch, you need to:

1. analyze the root cause of the bug in detail. 
2. output the file name that is most likely to cause the bug.

+import java.util.Arrays; +import java.util.UUID; + import javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest; +import org.apache.activemq.web.DestinationFacade; import org.apache.commons.logging.Log; import org.apache.commons.logging.LogFactory; import org.springframework.web.bind.ServletRequestDataBinder; @@ -41,8 +45,21 @@ public class BindingBeanNameUrlHandlerMapping extends BeanNameUrlHandlerMapping HandlerExecutionChain handlerExecutionChain = (HandlerExecutionChain) object; object = handlerExecutionChain.getHandler(); } - + if (object != null) { + // prevent CSRF attacks + if (object instanceof DestinationFacade) { + // check supported methods + if (!Arrays.asList(((DestinationFacade)object).getSupportedHttpMethods()).contains(request.getMethod())) { + throw new UnsupportedOperationException("Unsupported method " + request.getMethod() + " for path " + request.getRequestURI()); + } + // check the 'secret' + if (!request.getSession().getAttribute("secret").equals(request.getParameter("secret"))) { + throw new UnsupportedOperationException("Possible CSRF attack"); + } + } + + ServletRequestDataBinder binder = new ServletRequestDataBinder(object, "request"); try { binder.bind(request); @@ -56,6 +73,7 @@ public class BindingBeanNameUrlHandlerMapping extends BeanNameUrlHandlerMapping throw e; } } + return object; } } diff --git a/activemq-web-console/src/main/webapp/queueConsumers.jsp b/activemq-web-console/src/main/webapp/queueConsumers.jsp index d38fbfd5f..862c6075b 100644 --- a/activemq-web-console/src/main/webapp/queueConsumers.jsp +++ b/activemq-web-console/src/main/webapp/queueConsumers.jsp @@ -16,11 +16,11 @@ --%> -Consumers for ${requestContext.queueConsumerQuery.JMSDestination} +Consumers for <c:out value="${requestContext.queueConsumerQuery.JMSDestination}" /> -

Active Consumers for ${requestContext.queueConsumerQuery.JMSDestination}

+

Active Consumers for

diff --git a/activemq-web-console/src/main/webapp/browse.jsp b/activemq-web-console/src/main/webapp/browse.jsp index e2b76558a..6e7c4ec05 100644 --- a/activemq-web-console/src/main/webapp/browse.jsp +++ b/activemq-web-console/src/main/webapp/browse.jsp @@ -39,7 +39,7 @@ - @@ -49,7 +49,7 @@ @@ -57,7 +57,7 @@
" title="${row.properties}">${row.JMSMessageID} ${row.JMSCorrelationID} ${row.JMSType} - Delete + &messageId=${row.JMSMessageID}&secret=">Delete
-View Consumers +">View Consumers
diff --git a/activemq-web/src/main/java/org/apache/activemq/web/SessionFilter.java b/activemq-web/src/main/java/org/apache/activemq/web/SessionFilter.java index 120f43257..9a6988368 100644 --- a/activemq-web/src/main/java/org/apache/activemq/web/SessionFilter.java +++ b/activemq-web/src/main/java/org/apache/activemq/web/SessionFilter.java @@ -18,6 +18,7 @@ package org.apache.activemq.web; import java.io.IOException; +import java.util.UUID; import javax.servlet.Filter; import javax.servlet.FilterChain; @@ -39,7 +40,8 @@ public class SessionFilter implements Filter { } public void doFilter(ServletRequest request, ServletResponse response, FilterChain chain) throws IOException, ServletException { - ((HttpServletRequest)request).getSession(true); + // set secret to prevent CSRF attacks + ((HttpServletRequest)request).getSession(true).setAttribute("secret", UUID.randomUUID().toString());; chain.doFilter(request, response); } -- 2.34.1 diff --git a/activemq-web-console/src/main/java/org/apache/activemq/web/controller/CreateDestination.java b/activemq-web-console/src/main/java/org/apache/activemq/web/controller/CreateDestination.java index 7e1c7eebd..c25204225 100644 --- a/activemq-web-console/src/main/java/org/apache/activemq/web/controller/CreateDestination.java +++ b/activemq-web-console/src/main/java/org/apache/activemq/web/controller/CreateDestination.java @@ -39,4 +39,10 @@ public class CreateDestination extends DestinationFacade implements Controller { return redirectToBrowseView(); } + public String[] getSupportedHttpMethods() { + return new String[]{"POST"}; + } + + + } diff --git a/activemq-web/src/main/java/org/apache/activemq/web/BrokerFacadeSupport.java b/activemq-web/src/main/java/org/apache/activemq/web/BrokerFacadeSupport.java index 4b6bd88d2..f02737979 100644 --- a/activemq-web/src/main/java/org/apache/activemq/web/BrokerFacadeSupport.java +++ b/activemq-web/src/main/java/org/apache/activemq/web/BrokerFacadeSupport.java @@ -172,6 +172,7 @@ public abstract class BrokerFacadeSupport implements BrokerFacade { @SuppressWarnings("unchecked") public Collection getQueueConsumers(String queueName) throws Exception { String brokerName = getBrokerName(); + queueName = StringUtils.replace(queueName, "\"", "_"); ObjectName query = new ObjectName("org.apache.activemq:BrokerName=" + brokerName + ",Type=Subscription,destinationType=Queue,destinationName=" + queueName + ",*"); Set queryResult = getManagementContext().queryNames(query, null); diff --git a/activemq-web-console/src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/tags/form/short.tag b/activemq-web-console/src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/tags/form/short.tag index 3302e4429..ed82a97e1 100644 --- a/activemq-web-console/src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/tags/form/short.tag +++ b/activemq-web-console/src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/tags/form/short.tag @@ -17,6 +17,8 @@ <%@ attribute name="text" type="java.lang.String" required="true" %> <%@ attribute name="length" type="java.lang.Integer" required="false" %> <% + text = org.apache.commons.lang.StringEscapeUtils.escapeHtml(text); + text = org.apache.commons.lang.StringEscapeUtils.escapeJavaScript(text); if (length == null) length = 20; if (text.length() <= 20) { diff --git a/activemq-web-console/src/main/webapp/topics.jsp b/activemq-web-console/src/main/webapp/topics.jsp index 40f6a8514..310333dd8 100644 --- a/activemq-web-console/src/main/webapp/topics.jsp +++ b/activemq-web-console/src/main/webapp/topics.jsp @@ -23,6 +23,7 @@
+ "/> @@ -46,13 +47,13 @@ - +&JMSDestinationType=topic"> ${row.consumerCount} ${row.enqueueCount} ${row.dequeueCount} - Send To - Delete + &JMSDestinationType=topic">Send To + &JMSDestinationType=topic&secret=">Delete diff --git a/activemq-web-console/src/main/webapp/send.jsp b/activemq-web-console/src/main/webapp/send.jsp index ddcfcbe34..056c0a876 100644 --- a/activemq-web-console/src/main/webapp/send.jsp +++ b/activemq-web-console/src/main/webapp/send.jsp @@ -23,6 +23,7 @@

Send a JMS Message

+"/> @@ -37,7 +38,7 @@ + - + diff --git a/activemq-web-console/src/main/java/org/apache/activemq/web/controller/SendMessage.java b/activemq-web-console/src/main/java/org/apache/activemq/web/controller/SendMessage.java index 79003d7a1..037927b7c 100644 --- a/activemq-web-console/src/main/java/org/apache/activemq/web/controller/SendMessage.java +++ b/activemq-web-console/src/main/java/org/apache/activemq/web/controller/SendMessage.java @@ -209,4 +209,8 @@ public class SendMessage extends DestinationFacade impleme
- + diff --git a/activemq-web/src/main/java/org/apache/activemq/web/DestinationFacade.java b/activemq-web/src/main/java/org/apache/activemq/web/DestinationFacade.java index 8cfb0ee39..b7dfbf594 100644 --- a/activemq-web/src/main/java/org/apache/activemq/web/DestinationFacade.java +++ b/activemq-web/src/main/java/org/apache/activemq/web/DestinationFacade.java @@ -128,4 +128,8 @@ public class DestinationFacade { protected String getPhysicalDestinationName() { return createDestination().getPhysicalName(); } + + public String[] getSupportedHttpMethods() { + return new String[]{"GET", "POST"}; + } } diff --git a/activemq-web-console/src/main/webapp/queues.jsp b/activemq-web-console/src/main/webapp/queues.jsp index bb68e0ac0..ab535e471 100644 --- a/activemq-web-console/src/main/webapp/queues.jsp +++ b/activemq-web-console/src/main/webapp/queues.jsp @@ -21,8 +21,9 @@
- + + "/> @@ -48,22 +49,23 @@
"> ${row.queueSize} ${row.consumerCount} ${row.enqueueCount} ${row.dequeueCount} - Browse - Active Consumers
- - + ">Browse + ">Active Consumers
+ ?view=rss&feedType=atom_1.0" title="Atom 1.0"> + ?view=rss&feedType=rss_2.0" title="RSS 2.0"> 		- Send To - Purge - Delete + &JMSDestinationType=queue">Send To + &JMSDestinationType=queue&secret=">Purge + &JMSDestinationType=queue&secret=">Delete

### Modifications Summary

#### Modifications in Each File

1. **graph.jsp**
   - Updated the delete link to include a CSRF protection token (`secret`) in the URL.

2. **BindingBeanNameUrlHandlerMapping.java**
   - Added checks to prevent CSRF attacks by verifying the HTTP method and the presence of a valid `secret` token in the request.

3. **queueConsumers.jsp**
   - Used `c:out` to escape the `JMSDestination` value in the title and header.

4. **browse.jsp**
   - Updated the message link and delete link to use `c:out` for escaping `JMSDestination` values and included a `secret` token in the delete link.

5. **SessionFilter.java**
   - Set a unique `secret` attribute in the session to prevent CSRF attacks.

6. **CreateDestination.java**
   - Defined supported HTTP methods for the `CreateDestination` controller.

7. **BrokerFacadeSupport.java**
   - Sanitized the `queueName` by replacing double quotes with underscores.

8. **short.tag**
   - Escaped HTML and JavaScript in the `text` attribute to prevent XSS vulnerabilities.

9. **topics.jsp**
   - Added a `secret` token in the form for creating a new topic and used `c:out` for escaping `row.name`.

10. **send.jsp**
    - Included a `secret` token in the form for sending messages.

11. **DestinationFacade.java**
    - Defined supported HTTP methods for the `DestinationFacade`.

12. **queues.jsp**
    - Changed the form method to POST, added a `secret` token, and used `c:out` for escaping `row.name` in various links.

13. **SendMessage.java**
    - (No specific changes were detailed in the provided diff for this file.)

#### Relationships Between Modifications

- The modifications across multiple files are primarily focused on enhancing security against Cross-Site Request Forgery (CSRF) and Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerabilities. 
- The introduction of a `secret` token in session management and its inclusion in various forms and links ensures that actions performed on the web console are validated against potential CSRF attacks.
- The use of `c:out` in JSP files helps to prevent XSS by escaping user input before rendering it in the HTML, ensuring that any potentially harmful scripts are not executed.
- The changes in the `BindingBeanNameUrlHandlerMapping` and `SessionFilter` classes work together to enforce security checks on incoming requests, while the updates in the JSP files ensure that the front-end correctly implements these security measures.
- Overall, the modifications create a cohesive security framework that protects against both CSRF and XSS vulnerabilities throughout the web console application.

### Modifications in Each File

1. **SendMessage.java**
   - Added a method `getSupportedHttpMethods()` that returns an array containing the string "POST".

2. **SessionFilter.java**
   - Introduced a UUID-based "secret" attribute in the session to prevent CSRF attacks.

3. **CreateDestination.java**
   - Added a method `getSupportedHttpMethods()` that returns an array containing the string "POST".

4. **BrokerFacadeSupport.java**
   - Modified the `getQueueConsumers` method to replace double quotes in the `queueName` with underscores.

5. **queueConsumers.jsp**
   - Updated the title and header to use `<c:out>` for escaping output, preventing XSS vulnerabilities.

6. **short.tag**
   - Escaped HTML and JavaScript in the `text` attribute to prevent XSS vulnerabilities.

7. **topics.jsp**
   - Added a hidden input for the "secret" attribute and updated links to include the "secret" for CSRF protection.

8. **BindingBeanNameUrlHandlerMapping.java**
   - Implemented CSRF protection by checking the "secret" attribute and supported HTTP methods for requests.

9. **message.jsp**
   - Updated links to include the "secret" attribute for CSRF protection and used `<c:out>` for escaping.

10. **subscribers.jsp**
    - Changed the form method to "post" and added a hidden input for the "secret" attribute.

11. **send.jsp**
    - Added a hidden input for the "secret" attribute.

12. **web.xml**
    - Changed the URL pattern for filter mappings from `/*` to `*.jsp` to limit the scope of filters.

13. **CreateSubscriber.java**
    - No specific changes were detailed in the provided diff.

### Relationships Between Modifications

- The modifications across the files primarily focus on enhancing security by implementing CSRF protection and preventing XSS vulnerabilities. 
- The introduction of the "secret" attribute in the session (in `SessionFilter.java`) is a central change that is referenced in multiple files (e.g., `topics.jsp`, `message.jsp`, `subscribers.jsp`, and `send.jsp`) to ensure that any action taken by the user is validated against this secret.
- The addition of `getSupportedHttpMethods()` in `SendMessage.java` and `CreateDestination.java` ensures that only POST requests are accepted for these actions, which is a part of the broader effort to secure the web console.
- The use of `<c:out>` in JSP files (like `queueConsumers.jsp` and `topics.jsp`) is aimed at preventing XSS by escaping user input before rendering it in the HTML.
- The changes in `web.xml` to restrict filter mappings to `*.jsp` files indicate a shift towards more controlled access to the web console's resources, aligning with the overall security enhancements.
